did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The study utilized reflectance confocal microscopy (RCM) for imaging and relied on dermatologists to diagnose patients and analyze RCM characteristics manually. There is no mention of using AI, machine learning, deep learning, or computer vision algorithms to obtain results; the diagnosis was based on clinical experience and histological correlation.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
